title: umbilicus subulatus
intro: Umbilicus subulatus, also known as the prostrate pennywort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Umbilicus subulatus include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, while also being used to treat digestive issues and fever. Umbilicus subulatus can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or salves, making it a popular choice for natural medicine.
